message:
feat(fsqlite-e2e): expand E2E test coverage with file format and crash recovery tests

Significantly extends end-to-end testing infrastructure:

New tests:
- Add compat_file_format.rs for SQLite file format compatibility validation
  ensuring FrankenSQLite produces spec-compliant database files
- Add recovery_crash_wal_replay.rs for WAL crash recovery scenario testing,
  validating transaction durability guarantees after simulated failures

e2e_storage_stack.rs improvements:
- Refactor StageReport::success() and failure() for cleaner signature formatting
- Add explicit e2e_log_kv! macro calls with structured key-value logging
- Improve DDL stage with better error context in failure messages
- Update sqlite_master verification with fallback handling for Phase 5G features
- Expand test assertions with more detailed diagnostics

Also syncs beads issue tracker with current test development state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
